game_name: Dragon Quest III: Soshite Densetsu e

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this RPG title

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Combat System
special_mechanics.description: Standard turn-based RPG battle system consistent with Dragon Quest series conventions

special_mechanics.name: Day/Night Cycle
special_mechanics.description: Certain items, characters, and quests are only accessible at specific times of day

special_mechanics.name: Party Swap Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Player can freely swap characters in and out of party during exploration

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is an RPG with turn-based combat and grid-based movement. No continuous physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are applicable. The game focuses on character stats, experience leveling, and party management rather than real-time platforming mechanics. Movement speed and physics are stat-based rather than frame-based.
